description: An engineer needs to perform a material take-off from a set of design drawings to create a bill of materials for procurement.

nodes.task_description: Select the approved-for-construction drawings for the structural steel package.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the correct set of drawings.

nodes.task_description: Use a software tool to scan the drawings and automatically identify and quantify all the steel beams, columns, and plates.

expected_outcome.expected: The MTO tool generates a list of all steel components and their quantities.

nodes.task_description: Format the output into a bill of materials (BOM) and send it to the procurement team to source the steel.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a formal BOM and transmits it to the procurement system.
